summary.intent: Fix a failing CI pipeline for a GitHub Actions workflow that validates a plugin, specifically resolving a PATH issue preventing the Claude Code CLI from being found after installation via `bun install -g`.
summary.outcome: Switched from `bun install -g` + `export PATH` approach to using `bunx` directly, which avoids the PATH resolution issue entirely. The fix was committed and pushed to the PR branch.

repo: The repository uses GitHub Actions with `setup-bun` action, which may configure BUN_INSTALL to a non-standard location, causing `~/.bun/bin` PATH exports to fail.
The workflow file for plugin validation is at .github/workflows/validate-plugin.yaml

code.finding: Replaced `bun install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code && export PATH` pattern with `bunx` to avoid PATH resolution issues with globally installed bun packages in CI

workflow: When `bun install -g` + PATH export fails in CI, using `bunx` is a reliable workaround that avoids global install PATH issues entirely.
`setup-bun` GitHub Action may set BUN_INSTALL to a location other than `~`, making `~/.bun/bin` PATH exports ineffective.
Automated review bots (e.g., devin-ai-integration) may comment on code that gets superseded by subsequent fixes — verify relevance before addressing such comments.

friction: `export PATH=~/.bun/bin:$PATH` did not make the globally installed bun binary discoverable, even after multiple attempts, due to `setup-bun` placing binaries in an unexpected location.
Required multiple CI failure iterations to diagnose the root cause of the PATH issue before switching strategies.
open_items: CI run 24331478708 triggered the fix but the outcome of the new `bunx`-based CI run was not confirmed in the transcript — monitoring was still ongoing.
The devin-ai-integration review comment about duplicate `export PATH` was rendered moot by the fix but no explicit resolution/dismissal was confirmed.
